signals.raw:
Bank of Korea Holds Policy Rate at 2.5% Amid Rising Inflation Pressures from Oil Prices (April 2026 Meeting)** | YES | HIGH confidence[7][8]

signals.headline: Solana Hits All-Time Record 167 Million Monthly Token Holders with Alpenglow Upgrade Boost | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Hits All-Time Record 167 Million Monthly Token Holders with Alpenglow Upgrade Boost | YES | HIGH confidence**  
On April 14, 2026, Solana achieved a record 167 million monthly token holders and 148 million daily non-vote transactions, fueled by the anticipated **Alpenglow consensus upgrade** reducing transaction finality from 12 seconds to 150 milliseconds[2].
